positive: A highly stylized, bold linear graphic of an astronaut floating through a nebulae backdrop. The astronaut is minimalist, depicted as a clean silhouette, surrounded by intricate, geometric stardust elements and nebulous swirls of color. Focus on high contrast black lines against vibrant cyan, deep indigo, and warm magenta gradients. Central composition, perfect for apparel print. Vector style, graphic novel aesthetic, clean lines, symmetrical balance, pop art influence, isolated on white background for adaptability. UHD, highly detailed.
